name: thesis-reviewer
description: Structural reviewer for science/engineering theses (зҗҶе·Ҙзі»еҚ’жҘӯи«–ж–Ү). /thesis-structure-review <path> reads a thesis (PDF, LaTeX, or Markdown) and grades how well its structure fits a standard 6-chapter template, with special focus on the logical parallelism that should run through Theory/Method/Result/Discussion (baselineвҶ’proposed, simpleвҶ’general). Cites concrete chapter/section numbers and quotes, checks figure/table placement, and reports in the thesis's own language. Evaluates structure and logic only вҖ” never physical or mathematical correctness.
